title: Flight data pod
abstract: A flight data pod includes an aerodynamically efficient main body having a mounting bracket for securing the pod onto the wings, fuselage or strut of an aircraft during flight. A sensor suite is positioned within the main body to independently capture flight data information pertaining to the flight characteristics, statistics, metrics, performance and environment of the aircraft during flight. A control unit is positioned within the main body to selectively control an operation of the sensor suite, store the flight data information within a memory and communicate with a user device. A mobile application displays the flight data information and communicates operating instructions to the pod, and a power generation unit generates power for use by the system components during flight.
claims: Claims Claims Claim 1. A flight data pod, comprising: a main body having a front end, a back end, a middle section and an interior space; a mounting bracket that is in communication with the main body, said mounting bracket including an attachment fitting that is configured to engage at least one of an aircraft wing, an aircraft fuselage and an aircraft strut; a sensor suite positioned within the main body, said suite functioning to capture flight data information; and a control unit that is positioned within the main body, said control unit functioning to control an operation of the sensor suite. Claim 2. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the control unit further includes: a memory for storing the flight data information Claim 3. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the control unit further includes: a wireless communication unit that is configured to transmit the flight data information to at least one of a tablet, a smartphone and a computer. Claim 4. The flight data pod of claim 3, wherein the wireless communication unit comprises a WiFi transceiver. Claim 5. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the flight data information includes each of an airspeed, an altitude, a climb rate, and a heading. Claim 6. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the flight data information includes satellite navigation information. Claim 7. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the flight data information comprises: radio information including voice, ADS-b and squawk. Claim 8. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the sensor suite includes an Attitude and Heading Reference System. Claim 9. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the sensor suite includes a pitot-static system. Claim 10. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the sensor suite includes a GPS navigation system. Claim 11. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the sensor suite includes a radio system. Claim 12. The flight data pod of claim 1, further comprising: at least one battery for providing power to each of the control unit and the sensor suite. Claim 13. The flight data pod of claim 12, further comprising: a power generation unit that is configured to generate power for storage by the at least one battery. Claim 14. The flight data pod of claim 13, wherein the power generation unit comprises: a generator that is mechanically connected to a shaft and a blade assembly. Claim 15. The flight data pod of claim 14, wherein the shaft traverses the back end of the main body, and the blade assembly is positioned adjacent to the back end of the main body. Claim 16. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the main body includes an aerodynamic ally efficient teardrop shape. Claim 17. The flight data pod of claim 1, wherein the mounting bracket is removably connected to the main body.
